Bob Dylan

Entertainment Centre, Sydney, New South Wales, Australia, September 3, 1998:

This is LB-2817.

Dylan Set:
Dat > CDR > EAC > Flac (taper IN)

Disk 1
01 Maggie's Farm 
02 Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You 
03 Cold Irons Bound 
04 Shelter From The Storm 
05 Can't Wait 
06 Silvio 
07 Stone Walls And Steel Bars (acoustic w band) 
08 Desolation Row (acoustic w band) 
09 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic w band) 
10 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic w band) 
11 Blind Willie McTell 

Disk 2
01 'Til I Fell In Love With You 
02 Love Sick 
03 Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35 
04 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic w band) 
05 Highway 61 Revisited 
06 Forever Young (acoustic w band)
